question: Which quarter demonstrates the best overall restaurant performance based on the stacked area chart?

options.A: Q1 demonstrates the best overall performance with the most favorable indicator levels.
options.B: Q2 demonstrates the best overall performance with balanced indicator levels.
options.C: The chart cannot determine overall restaurant performance because it combines unrelated metrics.
options.D: Q4 demonstrates the best overall performance with the highest total area.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Sales, Kitchen Temperature, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
